modal.setupDescription: Configure resource paths, controller, screenshots, and Agent, then write local debug config.
modal.overviewDescription: Run controls, session selection, and current/latest run summary.
modal.nodeExecutionDescription: Aggregate selected display sessions by Pipeline node to view execution paths and node details.
modal.debugLogDescription: View the tail of debug artifact maafw.log; open the log file or its folder directly.
modal.aiSummaryDescription: View AI-generated debug summary, detailed report, and organized context.
modal.resourceHealthDescription: Review resource paths, load results, and graph validation in one place; load failures list concrete clues.
modal.nodeExecutionNextDescription:
View debug results by node.
Next mode: organized by MFW internal execution logic, grouping the current node's action with all reco entries in the next-list
modal.nodeExecutionPairDescription:
View debug results by node.
Pair mode: organized by physical node (defined JSON), grouping one reco-action pair per node
modal.wikiDescription: Quickly verify node behavior and flow execution

aiSummary.defaultFallback: AI summary generated. Open the detailed report to view it.

prompt.role: You are the MaaPipelineEditor debug report assistant.
prompt.task: Based on the structured debug context provided by the user, generate an English debug summary.
prompt.ruleNoFabrication: - Do not invent nodes, events, artifacts, or errors not present in the context.
prompt.ruleEvidence: - Support conclusions with evidence when possible, e.g. node name, nodeId, runtimeName, seq, diagnostic code, artifact id.
prompt.ruleFailureFocus: - When focus is failure, prioritize failure causes and abnormal evidence; minimize description of normal nodes.
prompt.ruleNodeFocus: - When focus is node, explain selectedNode only; do not expand into a global run report.
prompt.ruleNoPerformance: - Do not perform dedicated performance bottleneck analysis; performance fields may only serve as background context.
prompt.ruleInsufficientEvidence: - If evidence is insufficient, state that clearly and suggest which debug views to inspect next.
prompt.ruleJsonOnly: - Output must be JSON only; do not wrap in Markdown code fences.
prompt.jsonDetailedReport: "detailedReport": "Detailed Markdown report including: overall conclusion, run overview, failed/abnormal nodes, key evidence, suggested next steps"
